ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pitches" (
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitch */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the pitch was part of */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* Inning number when the pitch was thrown */,
  "inning_half" TEXT /* Top or bottom of the inning */,
  "outs" INTEGER /* Number of outs when the pitch was thrown */,
  "balls" INTEGER /* Number of balls in the current at-bat */,
  "strikes" INTEGER /* Number of strikes in the current at-bat */,
  "batter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batter facing the pitch */,
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitcher throwing the pitch */,
  "pitch_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of pitch */,
  "location_x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the pitch location */,
  "location_y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the pitch location */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Velocity of the pitch in miles per hour */,
  "is_strike" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the pitch was a strike */,
  "is_swing" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the batter swung at the pitch */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the result of the pitch */,
  "inning_score_home" INTEGER /* Score of the home team at the start of the inning */,
  "inning_score_away" INTEGER /* Score of the away team at the start of the inning */,
  "inning_outs" INTEGER /* Number of outs at the start of the inning */,
  "inning_balls" INTEGER /* Number of balls at the start of the inning */,
  "inning_strikes" INTEGER /* Number of strikes at the start of the inning */,
  "inning_at_bat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the at-bat within the inning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitches_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES pitch_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitches_pitch_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitch_type_id") REFERENCES pitch_types ("pitch_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitches_pitcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitcher_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitches_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitches_batter_id FOREIGN KEY ("batter_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the umpire officiating the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_umpire_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  "team_mascot" TEXT /* Name of the team's mascot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "stadium_opened_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was opened */,
  "stadium_location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the stadium */,
  "stadium_surface_type" TEXT /* Type of playing surface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitch_types" (
  "pitch_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitch type */,
  "pitch_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the pitch type (e.g., Fastball, Curveball) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pitch type */,
  "pitch_speed_range_min" REAL /* Minimum speed range for the pitch type */,
  "pitch_speed_range_max" REAL /* Maximum speed range for the pitch type */,
  "pitch_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the pitch type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitch_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., Pitcher, Batter) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_birthday" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "player_handedness" TEXT /* Handedness for batting and throwing */,
  "player_position_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the player's position */,
  "player_batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "player_era" REAL /* Earned Run Average for pitchers */,
  "player_salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Full name of the umpire */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the umpire (e.g., Home Plate, First Base) */,
  "umpire_birthday" TEXT /* Date of birth of the umpire */,
  "umpire_experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "umpire_assigned_leagues" TEXT /* Leagues the umpire has officiated in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitch_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitch result */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the pitch result (e.g., Strikeout, Walk) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pitch result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)
